task_completion.description: Remove the default 'Amateur' module from GPredict.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Amateur' tab or window is no longer visible in the main GPredict interface.

task_completion.description: Establish a ground station named 'Zion_Canyon' with the specified coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ground Station configuration window or module settings show the name 'Zion_Canyon' with Latitude 37.2982, Longitude -113.0263 (or 113.0263 W), and Altitude 1300m.

task_completion.description: Set the global minimum elevation to 30 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict Preferences window (under Modules) or the specific module configuration shows the 'Minimum elevation' parameter set to 30 degrees.

task_completion.description: Create a new tracking module named 'GNSS_Survey'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new module tab or window is visible with the title 'GNSS_Survey'.

task_completion.description: Include the specified NAVSTAR and GALILEO satellites in the module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'GNSS_Survey' module configuration or the active view explicitly lists NAVSTAR 73, NAVSTAR 74, NAVSTAR 75, GALILEO 25, and GALILEO 26 (or their corresponding NORAD IDs: 43873, 44431, 45854, 49589, 49590).

task_completion.description: Configure the 'GNSS_Survey' module to display ONLY a Polar view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'GNSS_Survey' module displays a single circular polar plot (radar-like view). No other views, such as a map or list view, are present in this module.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GPredict graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GPredict application windows, menus, and dialog boxes being actively used.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing configuration files in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open showing GPredict .cfg files being manually typed out.

integrity.description: The results appear in the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final polar view and module tabs are rendered natively by GPredict, not mocked up or printed in a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground station 'Zion_Canyon' must have exactly Latitude 37.2982 N, Longitude 113.0263 W (or -113.0263), and Altitude 1300m. The global minimum elevation must be set to 30 degrees. The 'GNSS_Survey' module must contain exactly these satellites: NAVSTAR 73 (43873), NAVSTAR 74 (44431), NAVSTAR 75 (45854), GALILEO 25 (49589), and GALILEO 26 (49590). The module must be configured to show ONLY a Polar view (which natively maps to view_type 2 in GPredict).
